SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-12-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KUNG-KAY CHIU (SPELLING OF LAST NAME CORRECTED PER PLAINTIFF) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KHALID MUSHASA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JESSICA SPENCER (DIRECTOR OF HR). COURT ORDERS TO DISMISS KHALID MUSHASA AS INDIVIDUAL NAMED DEFENDANT AND TO ADD 661-663 DIVISADERO STREET, LLC AS NAME DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREIN DEFENDANT 661 DIVISADERO, LLC WILL PAY PLAINTIFF $4,080.00 FOR SETTLEMENT AND MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS RELATED TO THIS ACTION. PROGRESS REPORT HEARING SET FOR WED. APRIL 12, 2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, THEN CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
